title: ToTheStarsRemake
description: A remake of ToTheStars, allows you to travel to stars in galacticraft.
body:
This mod allows you to land on stars in Galacticraft and its add-ons.
 
It is a remastered version of [ToTheStars](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/tothestars), integrated and expanded with content from [HaveASolTime](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/haveasoltime), supporting operation via MixinBooter 10.0 and above.
 
This mod is incompatible with the new star map feature of AsmodeusCore. The issue where launch fails and celestial body selection gets cleared has been fixed in version 1.0.5.
 
This mod does not contain any APIs.
